abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Swamp Lights
abilities.text: This model may remove a Glowy token on it to reduce damage dealt to it by 2.

abilities.name: "Who Hit Me?!"
abilities.text: Once per activation. After resolving a friendly action in which this model suffered damage, one model with this ability damaged in this way may declare a (melee) action.

actions.name: Tusk Slam
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Like Butter
triggers.text: Remove a Glowy token from this model or the target. When resolving, deal +1 damage, and damage from this attack is irreducible.

actions.name: Heroic Intervention
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy engaged with another friendly model only.
actions.effects: Move all friendly models engaged with the target 5" away from the target. Then, place this model in base contact with the target. This model may declare a (melee) targeting the target.

triggers.name: Disarming Flash
triggers.text: Remove a friendly Pyrotechnic marker within 3" of the target. Until the end of this activation, the target may not cheat or empower.
